Sherlock Gnomes (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $43,242,871Details
International Box Office $54,216,235
Worldwide Box Office $97,459,106
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,617,662
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,685,250
Total $7,302,912
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Get ready for a phe-gnome-nal adventure inside the secret world of garden gnomes! When Gnomeo and Juliet discover their friends and family have gone missing, there’s only one gnome to call – the legendary detective Sherlock Gnomes. Working together, the mystery takes them beyond the garden walls and across the city on an unforgettable journey to save the day and bring the gnomes home.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,604,774 (24.5% of total gross)
Legs:4.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$59,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,662 opening theaters/3,662 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $56,771,106

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 23rd, 2018 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: March 15th, 2018 (Wide), released as ШЕРЛОК ГНОМС (Russia (CIS))
March 16th, 2018 (Wide) (Poland)
March 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
March 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Indonesia)
March 23rd, 2018 (Wide) (Taiwan)
Video Release: June 5th, 2018 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for some rude and suggestive humor.
(Rating bulletin 2516 (Cert #51360), 2/28/2018)
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: Gnomeo and Juliet
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animated Inanimate Objects, Legacy Sequel
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Missing Person, Private Investigator, Romance
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Rocket Pictures, Paramount Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Get ready for a phe-gnome-nal adventure inside the secret world of garden gnomes! When Gnomeo and Juliet discover their friends and family have gone missing, there’s only one gnome to call – the legendary detective Sherlock Gnomes. Working together, the mystery takes them beyond the garden walls and across the city on an unforgettable journey to save the day and bring the gnomes home.
